The Uninvited (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $28,596,818Details
International Box Office $14,182,143
Worldwide Box Office $42,778,961
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $12,509,394
Total $12,509,394
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,325,824 (36.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.77 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:66.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,344 opening theaters/2,344 max. theaters, 4.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $45,602,392

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 30th, 2009 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
Video Release: April 28th, 2009 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violent and disturbing images, thematic material, sexual content, language and teen drinking
Running Time: 87 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign-Language Remake, Remake
Plot point: Death of a Sibling, Dysfunctional Family, Faulty Memory, Hallucinations, Imaginary Character, Surprise Twist, Unbelieving Police, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Psychological Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Pictures, Cold Springs Pictures, Parkes+Macdonald Productions, Montecito Picture Company, Vertigo Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
